narrative:
North Canton 3-C (precinct in Stark County) has 981 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.1 percentage points.
